name: Instant Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the can of peaches or pineapple in the freezer for several hours until completely frozen.
2. Remove the can from the freezer and open it carefully.
3. Pour the frozen contents into a food processor equipped with a metal chopping blade, or into a blender.
4. Process the mixture until you achieve the desired consistency.
5. Serve immediately and enjoy your creamy, rich instant sorbet without added fat, sugar, or other ingredients.
Note: Frozen bananas can also be used in this recipe for an alternative frozen dessert. Freeze ripe bananas in zip-lock bags before using them to create a smooth, creamy texture similar to rich ice cream.
